The '''Mandalorian battle armor''' was a model of [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] in use during the [[Old Sith Wars]].

==Description==
The Mandalorian battle armor was a full body armor developed as a heavier version of the [[Mandalorian combat suit]]. The armor included a [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] with an internal [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]] and could be equipped with a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]]. In addition, the suit contained enough oxygen to provide the wearer 10 hours of breathable air.<ref name="KotORCG" /> The battle armor was particularly resilient to electrical-based attacks.<ref name="TSL" />

[[File:Mandalorian_Battle_Arrmor.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Atton Rand]] wearing a Mandalorian battle armor (without helmet)]]

==History==
Mandalorian battle armors were used by [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] and one such armor was worn by [[Mandalore the Indomitable]] himself. Later, during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], most Mandalorians joined the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Neo-Crusader]] movement and adopted the [[Neo-Crusader armor|Neo-Crusader light armor]]. However, veterans such as [[Rohlan Dyre]] continued to wear their old-fashioned battle armor during this conflict.<ref name="KotORCG" /> [[Cassus Fett]] might have sometimes worn a [[Cassus Fett's Battle Armor|battle armor]]<ref name="KotOR" /> in place of his usual golden Neo-Crusader light armor.<ref name="KotORCG" />

Decades later, Mandalorian battle armors were still in use during the [[Jedi Civil War]]<ref name="KotOR" /> and the [[Dark Wars]].<ref name="TSL" /> During that time, [[Canderous Ordo]] wore a [[Mandalore's armor|heavy Mandalorian battle armor]] as he assumed the position of [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']] as Mandalore the Preserver.<ref name="KotORCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mandalorian battle armor first appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.<ref name="KotOR" /> The ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' later provided more information about this armor and identified the Mandalorian armors worn by Mandalore the Indomitable in the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Tales of the Jedi'' comic series]] and by Rohlan Dyre in the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'' comic series]] as battle armors.<ref name="KotORCG" />
